command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'
JOB_ID="job-20260625T053228Z-16ca7671"

echo '=== JOB STATUS after 30s ==='
PAYLOAD=$(python3 -c "import json,base64; print(base64.b64encode(json.dumps({'action':'get_job_status','job_id':'$JOB_ID','origin':'test','requested_by':'jose'}).encode()).decode())")
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "/home/jose/.local/bin/moreno-delegate n8n --payload-b64 '$PAYLOAD'" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read())
job=d.get('job',{})
print('status:', job.get('status'))
print('stage:', job.get('stage'))
print('worker_usage:', job.get('worker_usage'))
for ev in job.get('events',[]):
    print(' event:', ev.get('stage'), '-', ev.get('message','')[:100])
print('artifacts:', list(job.get('artifacts',{}).keys()))
"

echo '=== RUNNER LOG NOW ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "cat /home/jose/.local/state/moreno-unified-delegator/logs/${JOB_ID}.runner.log 2>/dev/null | head -60" 2>&1

echo '=== DELEGATOR SOURCE DIR ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "ls /home/jose/.local/share/moreno-unified-delegator/" 2>&1

echo DONE_1914
